.file-embed.background: rgb(10, 18, 47) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.footnotes.background: rgb(10, 18, 47) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(15, 23, 52) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(8, 14, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-header-breadcrumb.font-family: "??", "??", Lato, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Microsoft YaHei Light", sans-serif, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.view-header-breadcrumb-separator.font-family: "??", "??", Lato, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Microsoft YaHei Light", sans-serif, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.view-header-title.font-family: "??", "??", Lato, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Microsoft YaHei Light", sans-serif, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)) no-repeat scroll 0px 5.6px / 13.2px padding-box border-box, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) url("app://obsidian.md/public/images/6155340132a851f6089e.svg") no-repeat scroll 0px 5.6px / 13.2px padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(8, 14, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(8, 14, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

code.background: rgb(10, 18, 47) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(8, 14, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(15, 23, 52) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(15, 23, 52) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.font-family: "??", "??", Lato, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Microsoft YaHei Light", sans-serif, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

div.multi-select-pill-content.font-family: "??", "??", Lato, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Microsoft YaHei Light", sans-serif, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

div.prompt.background: rgb(8, 14, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(15, 23, 52) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"text\"].font-family: "??", "??", Lato, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Microsoft YaHei Light", sans-serif, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

kbd.background: rgb(10, 18, 47) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(51, 65, 148) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(10, 18, 47) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
pre.font-family: "??", "??", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Source Code Pro", monospace

pre.language-js.background: rgb(10, 18, 47) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
pre.language-js.font-family: "??", "??", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Source Code Pro", monospace

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgb(10, 18, 47) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
